news.title: Oracle Q3 Earnings Call Highlights
news.summary: Oracle (NYSE:ORCL) executives said fiscal third-quarter 2026 results exceeded expectations “across the board,” pointing to accelerating growth in cloud applications, rapid expansion in multi-cloud database services, and continued demand that outstrips supply in AI infrastructure. news.title: Oracle beats Q3 earnings estimates, raises rev. outlook to $90B
news.summary: Oracle (ORCL) reported third quarter results on Tuesday after the closing bell. Adjusted earnings per share (EPS) came in at $1.79 (compared to analyst estimates of $1.70), and adjusted revenue came in at $17.19 billion (compared to analyst estimates of $16.89 billion). Oracle also raised its total revenue guidance for fiscal year 2027 to $90 billion. Market Domination Overtime host Josh Lipton takes a closer look at the numbers. To watch more expert insights and analysis on the latest market action, check out more Market Domination Overtime.

news.title: Oracle Corp (NYSE:ORCL) Reports Q3 2026 Earnings Beat, Stock Surges on Accelerating Growth
news.summary: Oracle's Q3 2026 earnings beat EPS estimates, with revenue near guidance. Strong cloud/AI growth and a 20% surge in key metrics drove a positive market reaction.

news.title: Oracle’s (NYSE:ORCL) Q1 CY2026: Beats On Revenue, Stock Soars
news.summary: Enterprise software giant Oracle (NYSE:ORCL) reported Q1 CY2026 results topping the market’s revenue expectations, with sales up 21.7% year on year to $17.19 billion. The company expects next quarter’s revenue to be around $19.08 billion, close to analysts’ estimates. Its non-GAAP profit of $1.79 per share was 5.7% above analysts’ consensus estimates.

news.title: Oracle (ORCL) Q3 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
news.summary: On the call today are Chairman and Chief Technology Officer, Lawrence Ellison; Chief Executive Officer, Clay McGork; Chief Executive Officer, Mike Cecilia; and Principal Financial Officer, Doug Caring.  A copy of the press release and financial tables, which includes supplemental financial details on our most recent quarter, guidance for our future results, a GAAP to non-GAAP reconciliation, and a selected list of customers who purchased Oracle Cloud Services or went live on Oracle Cloud recently will be available from our investor relations website.

news.title: Oracle stock surges post-earnings: This was 'make or break'
news.summary: Futurum CEO Daniel Newman sits down with Market Domination Overtime host Josh Lipton about Oracle's (ORCL) successful third quarter earnings report, how artificial intelligence (AI) partnerships will continue to drive the company's growth, and more. To watch more expert insights and analysis on the latest market action, check out more Market Domination Overtime.

news.title: Oracle shares jump on fiscal Q3 beat, boosted revenue guidance
news.summary: Oracle Corp (NYSE:ORCL, XETRA:ORC) shares moved more than 7% higher after the company reported stronger-than-expected earnings for its fiscal third quarter and raised its longer-term revenue outlook. news.title: Oracle (ORCL) Q3 Earnings and Revenues Surpass Estimates
